title: dupatya latifolia
intro: Dupatya latifolia, also known as Bitter Apple, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Dupatya latifolia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
